     6â†’export class DataGroupedByDayMapper {
     7â†’  public static map(
     8â†’    data?: PropsItemsTransactionsList[],
     9â†’  ): propsItemsListCardTransition[] {
    10â†’    if (!data) return [];
    11â†’
    12â†’    const getColors = (color?: string) => {
    13â†’      if (!color) return undefined;
    14â†’
    15â†’      return (
    16â†’        Object.entries(theme.colors).find(
    17â†’          ([_, value]) => value === color,
    18â†’        )?.[0] ?? color
    19â†’      );
    20â†’    };
    21â†’
    22â†’    return data.flatMap(({ date: label, items }) =>
    23â†’      items?.map((item, index) => ({
    24â†’        label,
    25â†’        showLabel: index === 0,
    26â†’        type: 'default',
    27â†’        leftIcon: item.icon,
    28â†’        leftIconColor: getColors(item.iconColor),
    29â†’        title: item.title,
    30â†’        titleColor: getColors(item.titleColor),
    31â†’        value: item.value,
    32â†’        valueColor: getColors(item.valueColor),
    33â†’        descriptionSecondary: item.description,
    34â†’        descriptionSecondaryColor: getColors(item.descriptionColor),
    35â†’        bgColor: getColors(item.bgColor),
    36â†’        showBackgroundLeftIcon: false,
    37â†’        showIcon: true,
    38â†’        showRightIcon: false,
    39â†’        lineThrough: item.icon === 'icon-corner-up-left',
    40â†’      })),
    41â†’    ) as propsItemsListCardTransition[];
    42â†’  }
    43â†’}
